title: Upcoming webinar: Power up your Customer Relationships with Monday CRM

posts.author: Stephen_tsj (Stephen MacLennan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We’re a Monday Partner and will be running a webinar in March on how to Power up your Customer Relationships with Monday CRM

We’ll be demonstrating how powerful and flexible Monday Sales CRM can be for your business through a full end to end demo of how it can take contact lists to leads, deals and eventually turn them into customers that you maintain.

This is a free webinar, however spaces are limited. Secure your spot with the link below:

Book your seat

Regards
Stephen MacLennan
